subject: infra(deploy): migrate from GitHub Pages to Vercel
body:
GitHub Pages requires base-path hacks, 404.html SPA routing workaround,
and manual env var injection for subpath deployments. Vercel handles all
of this natively with rewrites.

Changes:
- Delete .github/workflows/deploy.yml
- Add vercel.json with SPA rewrite rule
- Remove VITE_BASE_URL env var and dynamic base path from vite.config.ts
- Hardcode PWA manifest id/scope/start_url to '/'
- Remove GitHub Pages comment from router config
- Update README.md and PRODUCT_DEFINITION.md deployment sections

Tags: deployment, vercel, infrastructure, pwa
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: vercel-migration
Semver: minor
